title: Tibanna gas platform
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}}
{{Otheruses|Tibanna}}
[[File:Tibanna_gas_platform_JKTCG.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A tibanna gas mining platform.]]
'''Tibanna gas platforms''' were large floating structures that were used to extract [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas.

==History==
[[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] gas stations could be found on different [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]], like [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]],<ref name="SWE5">{{Film|VI}}</ref> [[Kaer]],<ref name="Legacy">''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]''</ref> [[Kril'Dor/Legends|Kril'Dor]],<ref name="JK:JA">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref> [[Vandin]] and [[Ord Ibanna]].

[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Battle above Taloraan|raided]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] platforms on Taloraan [[0 ABY/Legends|several]] [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="RSI">[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]</ref>

Following the [[Occupation of Bespin|confrontation]] at Bespin's [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] between [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], Imperial forces remained on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and had a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] watch over the platforms' mining operations. [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] fought against [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] for control of a platform during a [[Battle of Bespin (Galactic Civil War)|battle]] on Bespin.<ref name="SW:BF">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''</ref> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] also [[Raid on Bespin|raided]] the platforms to steal tibanna supplies.<ref name="RSII">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]''</ref> Rogue Squadron was assigned to destroy an Imperial research base on [[Destrillion]], but instead found a gas platform guarded by [[TIE/hu "Hunter" Multi-Role Starfighter|TIE Hunters]].<ref name="RSIII">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''</ref>

The [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaden Korr]], along with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], [[Mission to Kril'Dor|liberated]] another platform on Kril'Dor from the Empire.

==Behind the scenes==
Tibanna gas platforms first appeared in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. They have appeared on various planets in various sources.
